    "status": 1,
    "name": "Test dep by user",

    "head_doctor": null
}

{
    "patient": 4918,
    "doctor": 36,
    "date": "2025-10-10",
    "time": "11:30",
    "disease": "additinal field",
    "problem": "Runny nose and headache",
    "my_param": "some random value"
}

{
    "patient": -4918,
    "doctor": 36,
    "date": "2025-10-10",
    "time": "11:30",
    "disease": "negative integer user id",
    "problem": "Runny nose and headache"
}

{
    "patient": 4918,
    "doctor": 55,
    "date": "2029-10-10",
    "time": "17:30",
    "disease": "Doctor with no depart",
    "problem": "Doctor with no department"
}

{
    "patient": 4918,
    "doctor": "36",

    "time": "11:30",
    "disease": " digits in string",

}

    "patient": 4918,

    "date": "2025-10-10",
    "time": "11:30",

}

item.name: space before and after YYYY-MM-DD in future
correct date fromat incorect month value
correct date fromat incorect day value

body.raw:
{
    "patient": 4918,
    "doctor": 36,
